summary: Completed Phases 1-3, partial Phase 4. W=D approach deprecated, TaskFrame and WorldHistory infrastructure in place. Truth lemma bridge blocked on forward-only truth lemma adaptation.

artifacts.summary: 6-phase implementation plan, Phases 1-3 complete, Phase 4 partial

review_reason: Phase 4 blocked: forward-only truth lemma adaptation needed. The singleton BFMCS has modal_backward sorry, requiring a forward-only version of the truth lemma.

completion_data.completion_summary: Completed W=D deprecation (Phase 1), TimelineQuot TaskFrame instantiation (Phase 2), and verified existing WorldHistory/Omega infrastructure (Phase 3). Phase 4 (truth lemma bridge) is partially complete but blocked on adapting the forward-only truth lemma. Two sorries remain: timelineQuotMCS_at_zero_eq_root and the main countermodel sorry in TimelineQuotCompleteness.lean.

partial_progress.details: Phase 4 partial - truth lemma infrastructure identified but forward-only adaptation needed
blocking_issues: Forward-only truth lemma not yet implemented
timelineQuotMCS_at_zero_eq_root needs proof that root point maps to time 0
